title: Harnaidan

'''Harnaidan''' was the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of and one of the largest [[City/Legends|cities]] on [[Muunilinst/Legends|Muunilinst]], and served as the headquarters of the [[InterGalactic Banking Clan/Legends|InterGalactic Banking Clan]]. Its towers anchored a [[Skyhook/Legends|skyhook]] to the orbital city of [[High Port Space Center|High Port]]. Harnaidan was [[Battle of Muunilinst|invaded]] by [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] forces during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] in [[22 BBY/Legends|21.66 BBY]].

==Description==
[[File:Harnaidan_metropolis.png|thumb|left|250px|Harnaidan was a massive metropolis.]]
Located on the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Muunilinst/Legends|Muunilinst]] and one of the greatest<ref name="GatORW">''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]''</ref> and largest<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|II|20|Harnaidan}}</ref> of the [[Muun/Legends|Muun]] [[City/Legends|cities]], Harnaidan was the planetary [[Capital/Legends|capital]]<ref name="TCWCG">''[[The Clone Wars Campaign Guide]]''</ref> and headquarters of the [[InterGalactic Banking Clan/Legends|InterGalactic Banking Clan]]. The city was built up around a collection of spires that reached up to over four [[Kilometer/Legends|kilometers]] in height, and the spires themselves,<ref name="GatORW" /> with foundations sunk deep in bedrock,<ref name="CSWE" /> served as an anchor for a [[Skyhook/Legends|skyhook]] that connected Harnaidan to [[High Port Space Center]] in [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]] above the planet. These massive structures were also the exclusive domain of the Banking Clan.<ref name="GatORW" />

Beneath the surface of Harnaidan laid a series of underground lakes heated by deep magma vents. The city's commoners descended into the rich [[Water/Legends|waters]] to harvest [[Mollusk/Legends|mollusks]] and [[Algae/Legends|algae]]. Surrounding Harnaidan were [[Volcano/Legends|volcanic]] spires. The metropolis itself was composed of gleaming marble edifices<ref name="GatORW" /> constructed in the [[Neo-Classical]] style<ref name="Darth Plagueis" /> and was home to over fifty million Muuns.<ref name="GatORW" /> The layout of the city was orderly, in contrast to urban areas on [[Denon/Legends|Denon]] and [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].<ref name="Darth Plagueis" />

==History==
===Separatist stronghold===
{{Quote|Our centuries-old lineage within the Core has leant credence to the newly-minted currency, which represents the assets of the Separatist worlds. In many worlds of the Mid Rim, it is trading at more than 50 percent of the value of a standard Republic credit, and in the Outer Rim, it is the exclusive currency of hundreds of worlds.|Bank Communications Officer Lo Vapeet|<ref name="Shadowfeed">{{InsiderCite|66|CIS Shadowfeed Dispatch 14:3:10 Edition}}</ref>}}
During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], a [[Shadowfeed/Legends|CIS Shadowfeed]] report from Harnaidan indicated that the ability of the InterGalactic Banking Clan to operate within Republic financial circles, due to their mandated non-exclusivity, had bolstered the value of the [[CIS credit]]. According to a monthly statement from [[Bank Communications Officer]] [[Lo Vapeet]], which was included in the report, the CIS credit was trading at over half the value of the [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|Republic credit]] in many [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] markets and was the exclusive currency of hundreds of Outer Rim worlds.<ref name="Shadowfeed" />

===Republic devastation===
[[File:Harnaidan.jpg|thumb|right|250px|A recon droid surveying its surroundings during the Battle of Muunilinst]]
During the [[Battle of Muunilinst/Legends|Battle of Muunilinst]]<ref name="CloneWarsC2" /> in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]],<ref name="Date1" /> the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]], under the command of [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], assaulted Harnaidan. Just prior to engaging the [[Separatist Droid Army/Legends|Separatist Droid Army]] outside the city, Kenobi dispatched [[The Muunilinst 10]] to infiltrate the city in their [[Muunilinst 10 LAAT|gunship]]. Though their gunship was shot down,<ref name="CloneWarsC2" /> the elite group managed to fight their way through the streets to the massive [[Harnaidan defensive cannon|defense cannon]] protecting Harnaidan and destroy it.<ref name="CloneWarsC3">{{CW|3}}</ref>

With the [[Cannon/Legends|cannon]] out of commission,<ref name="CloneWarsC3" /> the Republic bombarded Harnaidan extensively using [[Self-Propelled Heavy Artillery]], with entire city-blocks reduced to rubble. To repel the enemy's advancement,<ref name="CloneWarsC4">{{CW|4}}</ref> [[IG lancer droid/Legends|IG lancer combat droids]] led by [[Gen'Dai/Legends|Gen'Dai]]<ref name="DurgeDB">{{DB|character|durge|Durge}}</ref> [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] [[Durge]] engaged the Republic, destroying many [[All Terrain Tactical Enforcer/Legends|All Terrain Tactical Enforcer]] [[Walker/Legends|walkers]] and heavy artillery.<ref name="CloneWarsC4" /> [[Clone lancer trooper]]s led by Kenobi were deployed to stop Durge's forces, with Kenobi seemingly defeating Durge in a duel.<ref name="CloneWarsC8">{{CW|8}}</ref> The Jedi then rendevouzed with the Muunilinst 10 and captured the Separatist command center, though not before a regenerated Durge attacked the clones; however, the mercenary was once again defeated when Kenobi used [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] from inside Durge's body, causing him to explode.<ref name="CloneWarsC9">{{CW|9}}</ref>

The forces in the city were soon surprised to see [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] in his [[Azure Angel|starfighter]] chasing [[Asajj Ventress/Legends|Asajj Ventress]] in [[Ginivex-class starfighter/Legends|hers]]. In his attempts to shoot down Ventress, Skywalker dealt damage to a number of the city's buildings.<ref name="CloneWarsC11">{{CW|11}}</ref> Republic [[Acclamator-class transgalactic military assault ship/Legends|''Acclamator''-class assault ships]] soon landed in the city and were filled Muun and [[Neimoidian/Legends|Neimoidian]] [[Prisoner/Legends|prisoners]] from the devastated city.<ref name="CloneWarsC20">{{CW|20}}</ref>

==Inhabitants==
Harnaidan had a population of fifty million Muuns.<ref name="Darth Plagueis" />

==Behind the scenes==
{{Quote|The action takes place in a dollar bill.|Paul Rudish|<ref name="Databank">{{DB|location|muunilinst|Muunilinst}}</ref>}}
Harnaidan first appeared in "[[Chapter 2 (Star Wars: Clone Wars)|Chapter 2]]" of the animated microseries ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars]]'',<ref name="CloneWarsC2" /> which aired on [[November 10]], [[2003]]<ref name="TV.com1">{{TVcom|url=people/genndy-tartakovsky|text=Genndy Tartakovsky}}</ref> on [[Cartoon Network]].<ref name="TV.com2">{{TVcom|url=shows/star-wars-clone-wars|text=Star Wars: clone Wars}}</ref> Developed by Art Director [[Paul Rudish]], the overall look of the city as a banking center, including the architecture and green color pallete, was inspired by the artwork of the [[Wikipedia:United States one-dollar bill|United States dollar bill]].<ref name="Databank" />
